subject: Son Goku in base form, lunging forward in a striking attack pose
description: A figure with black spiky hair in an orange-and-dark outfit lunges forward aggressively toward the viewer, fist extended mid-strike. The pose is dynamic and close to the picture plane — the attacking arm nearly fills the foreground. The background shows speed lines and a bright sky-like field of blue and white, conveying rapid forward motion. Expression is focused and intense.
foreground: figure with black spiky hair lunging with extended fist, orange outfit
emotion: aggressive forward charge, fierce focus, committed attack
